description_long: This is a white, four-door sedan with a classic boxy design, likely from the late 1980s or early 1990s. The car features a long hood, a slightly sloped rear trunk, and black trim along the lower body and around the windows. The windows are tinted, and the windshield wipers are visible on the front windshield. The wheels appear to be missing or obscured, with some dark, irregular shapes where the wheels should be. The rear of the car has rectangular tail lights and a subtle badge, but no license plate is visible. The overall condition suggests the car may be abandoned or in disrepair.
description: A white, boxy four-door sedan with tinted windows, black trim, and missing or obscured wheels.
description_view_0: Side view showing the left profile, front windshield, and missing wheels.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the trunk, rear windshield, and tail lights.
description_view_2: Right side view with clear visibility of the right profile and missing wheels.
description_view_3: Front-right view showing the hood, front windshield, and partial right side.
